revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}}
This template is intended to allow simple standardized links to [[bibcode]]s. For example, <nowiki>{{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}}</nowiki> will produce {{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}}.

{{Documentation subpage}}
This template is intended to allow simple standardized links to [[bibcode]]s. For example, <nowiki>{{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}}</nowiki> will produce {{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}}.

{{Documentation subpage}}
This template is intended to allow simple standardized links to [[bibcode]]s. For example, <nowiki>{{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}}</nowiki> will produce {{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}}.
==See also== * [[Wikipedia:PMID]] * [[Wikipedia:ISBN]] * [[Wikipedia:ISSN]]
<includeonly> [[Category:External link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] </includeonly>

{{Documentation subpage}}
This template is intended to allow simple standardized links to [[bibcode]]s. For example, <nowiki>{{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}}</nowiki> will produce {{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}}.
==See also== * [[Wikipedia:PMID]] * [[Wikipedia:ISBN]] * [[Wikipedia:ISSN]] * [[Wikipedia:DOI]] * [[Template:doi]] * [[Template:doi-inline]]
<includeonly> [[Category:External link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] </includeonly>

{{Documentation subpage}}
This template is intended to allow simple standardized links to [[bibcode]]s. For example, <nowiki>{{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}}</nowiki> will produce {{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}}.
==See also== * [[Wikipedia:PMID]] * [[Wikipedia:ISBN]] * [[Wikipedia:ISSN]] * [[Wikipedia:DOI]] * [[Template:doi]] * [[Template:doi-inline]]
<includeonly> [[Category:External link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]
[[ja:Template:Bibcode]] </includeonly>

{{Documentation subpage}}
This template is intended to allow simple standardized links to [[bibcode]]s. For example, <nowiki>{{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}}</nowiki> will produce {{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}}.
==See also== * [[Wikipedia:PMID]] * [[Wikipedia:ISBN]] * [[Wikipedia:ISSN]] * [[Wikipedia:DOI]] * [[Template:doi]] * [[Template:doi-inline]]
<includeonly> [[Category:External link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]
[[es:Plantilla:Bibcode]] [[ja:Template:Bibcode]] </includeonly>

{{Documentation subpage}}
This template is intended to allow simple standardized links to [[bibcode]]s. For example, <nowiki>{{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}}</nowiki> will produce {{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}}.
==See also== * [[Wikipedia:PMID]] * [[Wikipedia:ISBN]] * [[Wikipedia:ISSN]] * [[Wikipedia:DOI]] * [[Template:doi]] * [[Template:doi-inline]]
<includeonly> [[Category:External link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]
[[es:Plantilla:Bibcode]] [[id:Templat:Bibcode]] [[ja:Template:Bibcode]] </includeonly>

{{Documentation subpage}}
This template is intended to allow simple standardized links to [[bibcode]]s. For example, <nowiki>{{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}}</nowiki> will produce {{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}}.
==See also== * [[Wikipedia:PMID]] * [[Wikipedia:ISBN]] * [[Wikipedia:ISSN]] * [[Wikipedia:DOI]] * [[Template:doi]] * [[Template:doi-inline]]
<includeonly> [[Category:Astronomy external link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]
[[es:Plantilla:Bibcode]] [[id:Templat:Bibcode]] [[ja:Template:Bibcode]] </includeonly>

{{Documentation subpage}}
This template is intended to allow simple standardized links to [[bibcode]]s. For example, <nowiki>{{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}}</nowiki> will produce {{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}}.
==See also== * [[Wikipedia:PMID]] * [[Wikipedia:ISBN]] * [[Wikipedia:ISSN]] * [[Wikipedia:DOI]] * [[Template:doi]] * [[Template:doi-inline]]
<includeonly> [[Category:Astronomy external link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]
[[es:Plantilla:Bibcode]] [[id:Templat:Bibcode]] [[ja:Template:Bibcode]] [[sl:Predloga:Bibcode]] </includeonly>
{{Documentation subpage}}

revision.comment: Reverted 1 edit by [[Special:Contributions/2602:306:8380:A950:2074:9EB3:CCCF:17D6|2602:306:8380:A950:2074:9EB3:CCCF:17D6]] ([[User talk:2602:306:8380:A950:2074:9EB3:CCCF:17D6|talk]]) to last revision by 65.94.40.137. ([[WP:TW|TW]])

revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{lua|Module:check bibcode}} This template is intended to allow simple standardized links to [[bibcode]]s. For example, {{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} will produce {{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} external link. ==Syntax== {{tlx|bibcode|place_bibcode_id_number_here}} ==Example== {{tlx|bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} {{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} ==Error messages== The Bibcode template checks the bibcode value to see it has the proper format.{{cite web |url=http://adsabs.harvard.edu/abs_doc/help_pages/data.html#bibcodes |title=1.2.3 - Bibliographic Identifiers |website=The SAO/NASA Astrophysics Data System}} When the assigned value does have the proper format, the template returns an error message along with the type of error that is encountered: :Check bibcode: Bibcode template values are expected to match these requirements: :length must be 19 characters ( = 'length') :characters in position(s): (except as specified otherwise, violations produce 'value' in the portion of the error message): ::1–4 must be digits and must represent a year in the range of 1000 – next year ( = 'year') ::5 must be a letter ::6–8 must be letter, ampersand, or dot (ampersand cannot directly precede a dot; &. ( = 'journal')) ::9 must be letter or dot ::10–18 must be letter, digit, or dot ::19 must be a letter or dot To resolve this error, ensure that the assigned bibcode value is correct. ==See also== * [[Wikipedia:PMID]] * [[Wikipedia:ISBN]] * [[Wikipedia:ISSN]] * [[Wikipedia:DOI]] * [[Template:doi]] * [[Template:doi-inline]] [[Category:Catalog lookup templates]] [[Category:Astronomy external link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[es:Plantilla:Bibcode]] [[id:Templat:Bibcode]] [[ja:Template:Bibcode]] [[sl:Predloga:Bibcode]]

revision.comment: Cleanup, Report bugs, errors, and suggestions at [[User talk:CitationCleanerBot]].
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{lua|Module:check bibcode}} This template is intended to allow simple standardized links to [[bibcode]]s. For example, {{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} will produce {{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} external link. ==Syntax== {{tlx|bibcode|place_bibcode_id_number_here}} ==Example== {{tlx|bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} {{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} ==Error messages== The Bibcode template checks the bibcode value to see it has the proper format.{{cite web |url=http://adsabs.harvard.edu/abs_doc/help_pages/data.html#bibcodes |title=1.2.3 - Bibliographic Identifiers |website=The SAO/NASA Astrophysics Data System}} When the assigned value does have the proper format, the template returns an error message along with the type of error that is encountered: :Check bibcode: Bibcode template values are expected to match these requirements: :length must be 19 characters ( = 'length') :characters in position(s): (except as specified otherwise, violations produce 'value' in the portion of the error message): ::1–4 must be digits and must represent a year in the range of 1000 – next year ( = 'year') ::5 must be a letter ::6–8 must be letter, ampersand, or dot (ampersand cannot directly precede a dot; &. ( = 'journal')) ::9 must be letter or dot ::10–18 must be letter, digit, or dot ::19 must be a letter or dot To resolve this error, ensure that the assigned bibcode value is correct. ==See also== * [[Wikipedia:PMID]] * [[Wikipedia:ISBN]] * [[Wikipedia:ISSN]] * [[Wikipedia:DOI]] * [[Template:doi]] * [[Template:doi-inline]] ==References== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Catalog lookup templates]] [[Category:Astronomy external link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[es:Plantilla:Bibcode]] [[id:Templat:Bibcode]] [[ja:Template:Bibcode]] [[sl:Predloga:Bibcode]]

{{Documentation subpage}} {{lua|Module:check bibcode}} This template is intended to allow simple standardized links to [[bibcode]]s. For example, {{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} will produce {{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} external link. ... ,,,===,,,***??? ...Bernstein ==Syntax== {{tlx|bibcode|place_bibcode_id_number_here}} ==Example== {{tlx|bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} {{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} ==Error messages== The Bibcode template checks the bibcode value to see it has the proper format.{{cite web |url=http://adsabs.harvard.edu/abs_doc/help_pages/data.html#bibcodes |title=1.2.3 - Bibliographic Identifiers |website=The SAO/NASA Astrophysics Data System}} When the assigned value does have the proper format, the template returns an error message along with the type of error that is encountered: :Check bibcode: Bibcode template values are expected to match these requirements: :length must be 19 characters ( = 'length') :characters in position(s): (except as specified otherwise, violations produce 'value' in the portion of the error message): ::1–4 must be digits and must represent a year in the range of 1000 – next year ( = 'year') ::5 must be a letter ::6–8 must be letter, ampersand, or dot (ampersand cannot directly precede a dot; &. ( = 'journal')) ::9 must be letter or dot ::10–18 must be letter, digit, or dot ::19 must be a letter or dot To resolve this error, ensure that the assigned bibcode value is correct. ==See also== * [[Wikipedia:PMID]] * [[Wikipedia:ISBN]] * [[Wikipedia:ISSN]] * [[Wikipedia:DOI]] * [[Template:doi]] * [[Template:doi-inline]] [[Category:Catalog lookup templates]] [[Category:Astronomy external link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[es:Plantilla:Bibcode]] [[id:Templat:Bibcode]] [[ja:Template:Bibcode]] [[sl:Predloga:Bibcode]]

{{Documentation subpage}} {{lua|Module:check bibcode}} This template is intended to allow simple standardized links to [[bibcode]]s. For example, {{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} will produce {{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} external link. ==Syntax== {{tlx|bibcode|place_bibcode_id_number_here}} ==Example== {{tlx|bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} {{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} ==Error messages== The Bibcode template checks the bibcode value to see if it has the proper format.{{cite web |url=http://adsabs.harvard.edu/abs_doc/help_pages/data.html#bibcodes |title=1.2.3 - Bibliographic Identifiers |website=The SAO/NASA Astrophysics Data System}} When the assigned value does not have the proper format, the template returns an error message along with the type of error that is encountered: :Check bibcode: Bibcode template values are expected to match these requirements: :length must be 19 characters ( = 'length') :characters in position(s): (except as specified otherwise, violations produce 'value' in the portion of the error message): ::1–4 must be digits and must represent a year in the range of 1000 – next year ( = 'year') ::5 must be a letter ::6–8 must be letter, ampersand, or dot (ampersand cannot directly precede a dot; &. ( = 'journal')) ::9 must be letter or dot ::10–18 must be letter, digit, or dot ::19 must be a letter or dot To resolve this error, ensure that the assigned bibcode value is correct. ==See also== * [[Wikipedia:PMID]] * [[Wikipedia:ISBN]] * [[Wikipedia:ISSN]] * [[Wikipedia:DOI]] * [[Template:doi]] * [[Template:doi-inline]] [[Category:Catalog lookup templates]] [[Category:Astronomy external link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[es:Plantilla:Bibcode]] [[id:Templat:Bibcode]] [[ja:Template:Bibcode]] [[sl:Predloga:Bibcode]]

revision.comment: /* See also */clean up per [[WP:CAT#T]] and [[WP:AWBREQ]] add template:Sandbox other
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{lua|Module:check bibcode}} This template is intended to allow simple standardized links to [[bibcode]]s. For example, {{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} will produce {{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} external link. ==Syntax== {{tlx|bibcode|place_bibcode_id_number_here}} ==Example== {{tlx|bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} {{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} ==Error messages== The Bibcode template checks the bibcode value to see if it has the proper format.{{cite web |url=http://adsabs.harvard.edu/abs_doc/help_pages/data.html#bibcodes |title=1.2.3 - Bibliographic Identifiers |website=The SAO/NASA Astrophysics Data System}} When the assigned value does not have the proper format, the template returns an error message along with the type of error that is encountered: :Check bibcode: Bibcode template values are expected to match these requirements: :length must be 19 characters ( = 'length') :characters in position(s): (except as specified otherwise, violations produce 'value' in the portion of the error message): ::1–4 must be digits and must represent a year in the range of 1000 – next year ( = 'year') ::5 must be a letter ::6–8 must be letter, ampersand, or dot (ampersand cannot directly precede a dot; &. ( = 'journal')) ::9 must be letter or dot ::10–18 must be letter, digit, or dot ::19 must be a letter or dot To resolve this error, ensure that the assigned bibcode value is correct. ==See also== * [[Wikipedia:PMID]] * [[Wikipedia:ISBN]] * [[Wikipedia:ISSN]] * [[Wikipedia:DOI]] * [[Template:doi]] * [[Template:doi-inline]] {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Catalog lookup templates]] [[Category:Astronomy external link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[es:Plantilla:Bibcode]] [[id:Templat:Bibcode]] [[ja:Template:Bibcode]] [[sl:Predloga:Bibcode]] }}

{{Documentation subpage}} {{lua|Module:check bibcode}} This template is intended to allow simple standardized links to [[bibcode]]s. For example, {{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} will produce {{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} external link. ==Syntax== {{tlx|bibcode|place_bibcode_id_number_here}} ==Example== {{tlx|bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} {{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} ==Error messages== The Bibcode template checks the bibcode value to see if it has the proper format.{{cite web |url=http://adsabs.harvard.edu/abs_doc/help_pages/data.html#bibcodes |title=1.2.3 - Bibliographic Identifiers |website=The SAO/NASA Astrophysics Data System}} When the assigned value does not have the proper format, the template returns an error message along with the type of error that is encountered: :Check bibcode: Bibcode template values are expected to match these requirements: :length must be 19 characters ( = 'length') :characters in position(s): (except as specified otherwise, violations produce 'value' in the portion of the error message): ::1–4 must be digits and must represent a year in the range of 1000 – next year ( = 'year') ::5 must be a letter ::6–8 must be letter, ampersand, or dot (ampersand cannot directly precede a dot; &. ( = 'journal')) ::9 must be letter or dot ::10–18 must be letter, digit, or dot ::19 must be a letter or dot To resolve this error, ensure that the assigned bibcode value is correct. ==See also== * [[Wikipedia:PMID]] * [[Wikipedia:ISBN]] * [[Wikipedia:ISSN]] * [[Wikipedia:Digital Object Identifier]] * [[Template:doi]] * [[Template:doi-inline]] {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Catalog lookup templates]] [[Category:Astronomy external link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[es:Plantilla:Bibcode]] [[id:Templat:Bibcode]] [[ja:Template:Bibcode]] [[sl:Predloga:Bibcode]] }}

{{Documentation subpage}} {{lua|Module:check bibcode}} This template is intended to allow simple standardized links to [[bibcode]]s. For example, {{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} will produce {{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} external link. ==Syntax== {{tlx|bibcode|place_bibcode_id_number_here}} ==Example== {{tlx|bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} {{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} ==Error messages== The Bibcode template checks the bibcode value to see if it has the proper format.{{cite web |url=http://adsabs.harvard.edu/abs_doc/help_pages/data.html#bibcodes |title=1.2.3 - Bibliographic Identifiers |website=The SAO/NASA Astrophysics Data System}} When the assigned value does not have the proper format, the template returns an error message along with the type of error that is encountered: :Check bibcode: Bibcode template values are expected to match these requirements: :length must be 19 characters ( = 'length') :characters in position(s): (except as specified otherwise, violations produce 'value' in the portion of the error message): ::1–4 must be digits and must represent a year in the range of 1000 – next year ( = 'year') ::5 must be a letter ::6–8 must be letter, ampersand, or dot (ampersand cannot directly precede a dot; &. ( = 'journal')) ::9 must be letter or dot ::10–18 must be letter, digit, or dot ::19 must be a letter or dot To resolve this error, ensure that the assigned bibcode value is correct. ==See also== * [[Wikipedia:PMID]] * [[Wikipedia:ISBN]] * [[Wikipedia:ISSN]] * [[Wikipedia:Digital Object Identifier * [[Template:doi]] * [[Template:doi-inline]] {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Catalog lookup templates]] [[Category:Astronomy external link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[es:Plantilla:Bibcode]] [[id:Templat:Bibcode]] [[ja:Template:Bibcode]] [[sl:Predloga:Bibcode]] }}

{{Documentation subpage}} {{lua|Module:check bibcode}} This template is intended to allow simple standardized links to [[bibcode]]s. For example, {{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} will produce {{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} external link. ==Syntax== {{tlx|bibcode|place_bibcode_id_number_here}} ==Example== {{tlx|bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} {{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} ==Error messages== The Bibcode template checks the bibcode value to see if it has the proper format.{{cite web |url=http://adsabs.harvard.edu/abs_doc/help_pages/data.html#bibcodes |title=1.2.3 - Bibliographic Identifiers |website=The SAO/NASA Astrophysics Data System}} When the assigned value does not have the proper format, the template returns an error message along with the type of error that is encountered: :Check bibcode: Bibcode template values are expected to match these requirements: :length must be 19 characters ( = 'length') :characters in position(s): (except as specified otherwise, violations produce 'value' in the portion of the error message): ::1–4 must be digits and must represent a year in the range of 1000 – next year ( = 'year') ::5 must be a letter ::6–8 must be letter, ampersand, or dot (ampersand cannot directly precede a dot; &. ( = 'journal')) ::9 must be letter or dot ::10–18 must be letter, digit, or dot ::19 must be a letter or dot To resolve this error, ensure that the assigned bibcode value is correct. {{reflist}} ==See also== * [[Wikipedia:PMID]] * [[Wikipedia:ISBN]] * [[Wikipedia:ISSN]] * [[Wikipedia:Digital Object Identifier]] * [[Template:doi]] * [[Template:doi-inline]] {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Catalog lookup templates]] [[Category:Astronomy external link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[es:Plantilla:Bibcode]] [[id:Templat:Bibcode]] [[ja:Template:Bibcode]] [[sl:Predloga:Bibcode]] }}

{{Documentation subpage}} {{lua|Module:check bibcode}} This template is intended to allow simple standardized links to [[bibcode]]s. For example, {{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} will produce {{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} external link. ==Syntax== {{tlx|bibcode|place_bibcode_id_number_here}} ==Example== {{tlx|bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} {{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} ==Error messages== The Bibcode template checks the bibcode value to see if it has the proper format.{{cite web |url=http://adsabs.harvard.edu/abs_doc/help_pages/data.html#bibcodes |title=1.2.3 - Bibliographic Identifiers |website=The SAO/NASA Astrophysics Data System}} When the assigned value does not have the proper format, the template returns an error message along with the type of error that is encountered: :Check bibcode: Bibcode template values are expected to match these requirements: :length must be 19 characters ( = 'length') :characters in position(s): (except as specified otherwise, violations produce 'value' in the portion of the error message): ::1–4 must be digits and must represent a year in the range of 1000 – next year ( = 'year') ::5 must be a letter ::6–8 must be letter, ampersand, or dot (ampersand cannot directly precede a dot; &. ( = 'journal')) ::9 must be letter or dot ::10–18 must be letter, digit, or dot ::19 must be a letter or dot To resolve this error, ensure that the assigned bibcode value is correct. {{reflist}} ==See also== * [[Wikipedia:PMID]] * [[Wikipedia:ISBN]] * [[Wikipedia:ISSN]] * [[Wikipedia:Digital Object Identifier]] * [[Template:doi]] * [[Template:doi-inline]] {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Catalog lookup templates]] [[Category:Astronomy external link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[es:Plantilla:Bibcode]] [[id:Templat:Bibcode]] [[ja:Template:Bibcode]] [[sl:Predloga:Bibcode]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{lua|Module:check bibcode}} This template is intended to allow simple standardized links to [[:en:Bibcode|Bibcode]]s. For example, {{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} will produce {{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} external link. ==Syntax== {{tlx|bibcode|place_bibcode_id_number_here}} ==Example== {{tlx|bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} {{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} ==Error messages== The Bibcode template checks the bibcode value to see if it has the proper format.{{cite web |url=http://adsabs.harvard.edu/abs_doc/help_pages/data.html#bibcodes |title=1.2.3 - Bibliographic Identifiers |website=The SAO/NASA Astrophysics Data System}} When the assigned value does not have the proper format, the template returns an error message along with the type of error that is encountered: :Check bibcode: Bibcode template values are expected to match these requirements: :length must be 19 characters ( = 'length') :characters in position(s): (except as specified otherwise, violations produce 'value' in the portion of the error message): ::1–4 must be digits and must represent a year in the range of 1000 – next year ( = 'year') ::5 must be a letter ::6–8 must be letter, ampersand, or dot (ampersand cannot directly precede a dot; &. ( = 'journal')) ::9 must be letter or dot ::10–18 must be letter, digit, or dot ::19 must be a letter or dot To resolve this error, ensure that the assigned bibcode value is correct. {{reflist}} ==See also== * [[Wikipedia:PMID]] * [[Wikipedia:ISBN]] * [[Wikipedia:ISSN]] * [[Wikipedia:Digital Object Identifier]] * [[Template:doi]] * [[Template:doi-inline]] {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Catalog lookup templates]] [[Category:Astronomy external link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[es:Plantilla:Bibcode]] [[id:Templat:Bibcode]] [[ja:Template:Bibcode]] [[sl:Predloga:Bibcode]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{lua|Module:check bibcode}} This template is intended to allow simple standardized links to [[:en:Bibcode|Bibcode]]s. For example, {{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} will produce {{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} external link. ==Syntax== {{tlx|bibcode|place_bibcode_id_number_here}} ==Example== {{tlx|bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} {{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} ==Error messages== The Bibcode template checks the bibcode value to see if it has the proper format.{{cite web |url=http://adsabs.harvard.edu/abs_doc/help_pages/data.html#bibcodes |title=1.2.3 - Bibliographic Identifiers |website=The SAO/NASA Astrophysics Data System}} When the assigned value does not have the proper format, the template returns an error message along with the type of error that is encountered: :Check bibcode: Bibcode template values are expected to match these requirements: :length must be 19 characters ( = 'length') :characters in position(s): (except as specified otherwise, violations produce 'value' in the portion of the error message): ::1–4 must be digits and must represent a year in the range of 1000 – next year ( = 'year') ::5 must be a letter ::6–8 must be letter, ampersand, or dot (ampersand cannot directly precede a dot; &. ( = 'journal')) ::9 must be letter or dot ::10–18 must be letter, digit, or dot ::19 must be a letter or dot To resolve this error, ensure that the assigned bibcode value is correct. {{reflist}} ==See also== * [[Wikipedia:PMID]] * [[Wikipedia:ISBN]] * [[Wikipedia:ISSN]] * [[Wikipedia:Digital Object Identifier]] * [[Template:doi]] * [[:en:Template:Doi-inline|Template:Doi-inline]] {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Catalog lookup templates]] [[Category:Astronomy external link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[es:Plantilla:Bibcode]] [[id:Templat:Bibcode]] [[ja:Template:Bibcode]] [[sl:Predloga:Bibcode]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{lua|Module:check bibcode}} This template is intended to allow simple standardized links to [[:en:Bibcode|Bibcode]]s. For example, {{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} will produce {{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} external link. ==Syntax== {{tlx|bibcode|place_bibcode_id_number_here}} ==Example== {{tlx|bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} {{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} ==Error messages== The Bibcode template checks the bibcode value to see if it has the proper format.{{cite web |url=http://adsabs.harvard.edu/abs_doc/help_pages/data.html#bibcodes |title=1.2.3 - Bibliographic Identifiers |website=The SAO/NASA Astrophysics Data System}} When the assigned value does not have the proper format, the template returns an error message along with the type of error that is encountered: :Check bibcode: Bibcode template values are expected to match these requirements: :length must be 19 characters ( = 'length') :characters in position(s): (except as specified otherwise, violations produce 'value' in the portion of the error message): ::1–4 must be digits and must represent a year in the range of 1000 – next year ( = 'year') ::5 must be a letter ::6–8 must be letter, ampersand, or dot (ampersand cannot directly precede a dot; &. ( = 'journal')) ::9 must be letter or dot ::10–18 must be letter, digit, or dot ::19 must be a letter or dot To resolve this error, ensure that the assigned bibcode value is correct. {{reflist}} ==See also== * [[Wikipedia:PMID]] * [[Wikipedia:ISBN]] * [[Wikipedia:ISSN]] * [[Wikipedia:Digital Object Identifier]] * [[Template:doi]] * [[:en:Template:Doi-inline|Template:Doi-inline]] {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Catalog lookup templates]] [[Category:Astronomy external link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[es:Plantilla:Bibcode]] [[id:Templat:Bibcode]] [[ja:Template:Bibcode]] [[sl:Predloga:Bibcode]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.comment: Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{lua|Module:check bibcode}} This template is intended to allow simple standardized links to [[:en:Bibcode|Bibcode]]s. For example, {{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} will produce {{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} external link. ==Syntax== {{tlx|bibcode|place_bibcode_id_number_here}} ==Example== {{tlx|bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} {{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} ==Error messages== The Bibcode template checks the bibcode value to see if it has the proper format.{{cite web |url=http://adsabs.harvard.edu/abs_doc/help_pages/data.html#bibcodes |title=1.2.3 - Bibliographic Identifiers |website=The SAO/NASA Astrophysics Data System}} When the assigned value does not have the proper format, the template returns an error message along with the type of error that is encountered: :Check bibcode: Bibcode template values are expected to match these requirements: :length must be 19 characters ( = 'length') :characters in position(s): (except as specified otherwise, violations produce 'value' in the portion of the error message): ::1–4 must be digits and must represent a year in the range of 1000 – next year ( = 'year') ::5 must be a letter ::6–8 must be letter, ampersand, or dot (ampersand cannot directly precede a dot; &. ( = 'journal')) ::9 must be letter or dot ::10–18 must be letter, digit, or dot ::19 must be a letter or dot To resolve this error, ensure that the assigned bibcode value is correct. {{reflist}} ==See also== * [[Wikipedia:PMID]] * [[Wikipedia:ISBN]] * [[Wikipedia:ISSN]] * [[Wikipedia:Digital Object Identifier]] * [[Template:doi]] * [[:en:Template:Doi-inline|Template:Doi-inline]] {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Catalog lookup templates]] [[Category:Astronomy external link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[es:Plantilla:Bibcode]] [[id:Templat:Bibcode]] [[ja:Template:Bibcode]] [[sl:Predloga:Bibcode]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.comment: Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{lua|Module:check bibcode}} This template is intended to allow simple standardized links to [[:en:Bibcode|Bibcode]]s. For example, {{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} will produce {{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} external link. ==Syntax== {{tlx|bibcode|place_bibcode_id_number_here}} ==Example== {{tlx|bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} {{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} ==Error messages== The Bibcode template checks the bibcode value to see if it has the proper format.{{cite web |url=http://adsabs.harvard.edu/abs_doc/help_pages/data.html#bibcodes |title=1.2.3 - Bibliographic Identifiers |website=The SAO/NASA Astrophysics Data System}} When the assigned value does not have the proper format, the template returns an error message along with the type of error that is encountered: :Check bibcode: Bibcode template values are expected to match these requirements: :length must be 19 characters ( = 'length') :characters in position(s): (except as specified otherwise, violations produce 'value' in the portion of the error message): ::1–4 must be digits and must represent a year in the range of 1000 – next year ( = 'year') ::5 must be a letter ::6–8 must be letter, ampersand, or dot (ampersand cannot directly precede a dot; &. ( = 'journal')) ::9 must be letter or dot ::10–18 must be letter, digit, or dot ::19 must be a letter or dot To resolve this error, ensure that the assigned bibcode value is correct. {{reflist}} ==See also== * [[Wikipedia:PMID]] * [[Wikipedia:ISBN]] * [[Wikipedia:ISSN]] * [[Wikipedia:Digital Object Identifier]] * [[Template:doi]] * [[:en:Template:Doi-inline|Template:Doi-inline]] {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Catalog lookup templates]] [[Category:Astronomy external link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[es:Plantilla:Bibcode]] [[id:Templat:Bibcode]] [[ja:Template:Bibcode]] [[sl:Predloga:Bibcode]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.comment: Bot: undo wikidata additions from past 2 hours
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{lua|Module:check bibcode}} This template is intended to allow simple standardized links to [[:en:Bibcode|Bibcode]]s. For example, {{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} will produce {{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} external link. ==Syntax== {{tlx|bibcode|place_bibcode_id_number_here}} ==Example== {{tlx|bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} {{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} ==Error messages== The Bibcode template checks the bibcode value to see if it has the proper format.{{cite web |url=http://adsabs.harvard.edu/abs_doc/help_pages/data.html#bibcodes |title=1.2.3 - Bibliographic Identifiers |website=The SAO/NASA Astrophysics Data System}} When the assigned value does not have the proper format, the template returns an error message along with the type of error that is encountered: :Check bibcode: Bibcode template values are expected to match these requirements: :length must be 19 characters ( = 'length') :characters in position(s): (except as specified otherwise, violations produce 'value' in the portion of the error message): ::1–4 must be digits and must represent a year in the range of 1000 – next year ( = 'year') ::5 must be a letter ::6–8 must be letter, ampersand, or dot (ampersand cannot directly precede a dot; &. ( = 'journal')) ::9 must be letter or dot ::10–18 must be letter, digit, or dot ::19 must be a letter or dot To resolve this error, ensure that the assigned bibcode value is correct. {{reflist}} ==See also== * [[Wikipedia:PMID]] * [[Wikipedia:ISBN]] * [[Wikipedia:ISSN]] * [[Wikipedia:Digital Object Identifier]] * [[Template:doi]] * [[:en:Template:Doi-inline|Template:Doi-inline]] {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Catalog lookup templates]] [[Category:Astronomy external link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[es:Plantilla:Bibcode]] [[id:Templat:Bibcode]] [[ja:Template:Bibcode]] [[sl:Predloga:Bibcode]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q6717399)
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{lua|Module:check bibcode}} This template is intended to allow simple standardized links to [[:en:Bibcode|Bibcode]]s. For example, {{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} will produce {{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} external link. ==Syntax== {{tlx|bibcode|place_bibcode_id_number_here}} ==Example== {{tlx|bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} {{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} ==Error messages== The Bibcode template checks the bibcode value to see if it has the proper format.{{cite web |url=http://adsabs.harvard.edu/abs_doc/help_pages/data.html#bibcodes |title=1.2.3 - Bibliographic Identifiers |website=The SAO/NASA Astrophysics Data System}} When the assigned value does not have the proper format, the template returns an error message along with the type of error that is encountered: :Check bibcode: Bibcode template values are expected to match these requirements: :length must be 19 characters ( = 'length') :characters in position(s): (except as specified otherwise, violations produce 'value' in the portion of the error message): ::1–4 must be digits and must represent a year in the range of 1000 – next year ( = 'year') ::5 must be a letter ::6–8 must be letter, ampersand, or dot (ampersand cannot directly precede a dot; &. ( = 'journal')) ::9 must be letter or dot ::10–18 must be letter, digit, or dot ::19 must be a letter or dot To resolve this error, ensure that the assigned bibcode value is correct. {{reflist}} ==See also== * [[Wikipedia:PMID]] * [[Wikipedia:ISBN]] * [[Wikipedia:ISSN]] * [[Wikipedia:Digital Object Identifier]] * [[Template:doi]] * [[:en:Template:Doi-inline|Template:Doi-inline]] {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Catalog lookup templates]] [[Category:Astronomy external link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[es:Plantilla:Bibcode]] [[id:Templat:Bibcode]] [[ja:Template:Bibcode]] [[sl:Predloga:Bibcode]] }} {{wikidata link|Q6717399}}

revision.comment: Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{lua|Module:check bibcode}} This template is intended to allow simple standardized links to [[:en:Bibcode|Bibcode]]s. For example, {{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} will produce {{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} external link. ==Syntax== {{tlx|bibcode|place_bibcode_id_number_here}} ==Example== {{tlx|bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} {{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} ==Error messages== The Bibcode template checks the bibcode value to see if it has the proper format.{{cite web |url=http://adsabs.harvard.edu/abs_doc/help_pages/data.html#bibcodes |title=1.2.3 - Bibliographic Identifiers |website=The SAO/NASA Astrophysics Data System}} When the assigned value does not have the proper format, the template returns an error message along with the type of error that is encountered: :Check bibcode: Bibcode template values are expected to match these requirements: :length must be 19 characters ( = 'length') :characters in position(s): (except as specified otherwise, violations produce 'value' in the portion of the error message): ::1–4 must be digits and must represent a year in the range of 1000 – next year ( = 'year') ::5 must be a letter ::6–8 must be letter, ampersand, or dot (ampersand cannot directly precede a dot; &. ( = 'journal')) ::9 must be letter or dot ::10–18 must be letter, digit, or dot ::19 must be a letter or dot To resolve this error, ensure that the assigned bibcode value is correct. {{reflist}} ==See also== * [[Wikipedia:PMID]] * [[Wikipedia:ISBN]] * [[Wikipedia:ISSN]] * [[Wikipedia:Digital Object Identifier]] * [[Template:doi]] * [[:en:Template:Doi-inline|Template:Doi-inline]] {{Sandbox other|| [[es:Plantilla:Bibcode]] [[id:Templat:Bibcode]] [[ja:Template:Bibcode]] [[sl:Predloga:Bibcode]] }} {{wikidata link|Q6717399}} [[Category:Astronomy external link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Catalog lookup templates]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{lua|Module:check bibcode}} This template is intended to allow simple standardized links to [[:en:Bibcode|Bibcode]]s. For example, {{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} will produce {{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} external link. ==Syntax== {{tlx|bibcode|place_bibcode_id_number_here}} ==Example== {{tlx|bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} {{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} ==Error messages== The Bibcode template checks the bibcode value to see if it has the proper format.{{cite web |url=http://adsabs.harvard.edu/abs_doc/help_pages/data.html#bibcodes |title=1.2.3 - Bibliographic Identifiers |website=The SAO/NASA Astrophysics Data System}} When the assigned value does not have the proper format, the template returns an error message along with the type of error that is encountered: :Check bibcode: Bibcode template values are expected to match these requirements: :length must be 19 characters ( = 'length') :characters in position(s): (except as specified otherwise, violations produce 'value' in the portion of the error message): ::1–4 must be digits and must represent a year in the range of 1000 – next year ( = 'year') ::5 must be a letter ::6–8 must be letter, ampersand, or dot (ampersand cannot directly precede a dot; &. ( = 'journal')) ::9 must be letter or dot ::10–18 must be letter, digit, or dot ::19 must be a letter or dot To resolve this error, ensure that the assigned bibcode value is correct. {{reflist}} ==See also== * [[Wikipedia:PMID]] * [[Wikipedia:ISBN]] * [[Wikipedia:ISSN]] * [[Wikipedia:Digital Object Identifier]] * [[Template:doi]] * [[:en:Template:Doi-inline|Template:Doi-inline]] {{Sandbox other|| [[es:Plantilla:Bibcode]] [[id:Templat:Bibcode]] [[ja:Template:Bibcode]] [[sl:Predloga:Bibcode]] }} {{wikidata link|Q6717399}} [[Category:Astronomy external link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Catalog lookup templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{lua|Module:check bibcode}} This template is intended to allow simple standardized links to [[:en:Bibcode|Bibcode]]s. For example, {{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} will produce {{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} external link. ==Syntax== {{tlx|bibcode|place_bibcode_id_number_here}} ==Example== {{tlx|bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} {{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} ==Error messages== The Bibcode template checks the bibcode value to see if it has the proper format.{{cite web |url=http://adsabs.harvard.edu/abs_doc/help_pages/data.html#bibcodes |title=1.2.3 - Bibliographic Identifiers |website=The SAO/NASA Astrophysics Data System}} When the assigned value does not have the proper format, the template returns an error message along with the type of error that is encountered: :Check bibcode: Bibcode template values are expected to match these requirements: :length must be 19 characters ( = 'length') :characters in position(s): (except as specified otherwise, violations produce 'value' in the portion of the error message): ::1–4 must be digits and must represent a year in the range of 1000 – next year ( = 'year') ::5 must be a letter ::6–8 must be letter, ampersand, or dot (ampersand cannot directly precede a dot; &. ( = 'journal')) ::9 must be letter or dot ::10–18 must be letter, digit, or dot ::19 must be a letter or dot To resolve this error, ensure that the assigned bibcode value is correct. {{reflist}} ==See also== * [[Wikipedia:PMID]] * [[Wikipedia:ISBN]] * [[Wikipedia:ISSN]] * [[Wikipedia:Digital Object Identifier]] * [[Template:doi]] * [[:en:Template:Doi-inline|Template:Doi-inline]] {{Sandbox other|| [[es:Plantilla:Bibcode]] [[id:Templat:Bibcode]] [[ja:Template:Bibcode]] [[sl:Predloga:Bibcode]] }} {{wikidata link|Q6717399}} [[Category:Astronomy external link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Catalog lookup templates]] [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23125537382|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{lua|Module:check bibcode}} This template is intended to allow simple standardized links to [[:en:Bibcode|Bibcode]]s. For example, {{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} will produce {{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} external link. ==Syntax== {{tlx|bibcode|place_bibcode_id_number_here}} ==Example== {{tlx|bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} {{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} ==Error messages== The Bibcode template checks the bibcode value to see if it has the proper format.{{cite web |url=http://adsabs.harvard.edu/abs_doc/help_pages/data.html#bibcodes |title=1.2.3 - Bibliographic Identifiers |website=The SAO/NASA Astrophysics Data System}} When the assigned value does not have the proper format, the template returns an error message along with the type of error that is encountered: :Check bibcode: Bibcode template values are expected to match these requirements: :length must be 19 characters ( = 'length') :characters in position(s): (except as specified otherwise, violations produce 'value' in the portion of the error message): ::1–4 must be digits and must represent a year in the range of 1000 – next year ( = 'year') ::5 must be a letter ::6–8 must be letter, ampersand, or dot (ampersand cannot directly precede a dot; &. ( = 'journal')) ::9 must be letter or dot ::10–18 must be letter, digit, or dot ::19 must be a letter or dot To resolve this error, ensure that the assigned bibcode value is correct. {{reflist}} ==See also== * [[Wikipedia:PMID]] * [[Wikipedia:ISBN]] * [[Wikipedia:ISSN]] * [[Wikipedia:Digital Object Identifier]] * [[Template:doi]] * [[:en:Template:Doi-inline|Template:Doi-inline]] {{Sandbox other|| [[es:Plantilla:Bibcode]] [[id:Templat:Bibcode]] [[ja:Template:Bibcode]] [[sl:Predloga:Bibcode]] }} {{wikidata link|Q6717399}} [[Category:Astronomy external link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Catalog lookup templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

{{Documentation subpage}} {{lua|Module:check bibcode}} This template is intended to allow simple standardized links to [[:en:Bibcode|Bibcode]]s. For example, {{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} will produce {{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} external link. ==Syntax== {{tlx|bibcode|place_bibcode_id_number_here}} ==Example== {{tlx|bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} {{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} ==Error messages== The Bibcode template checks the bibcode value to see if it has the proper format.{{cite web |url=http://adsabs.harvard.edu/abs_doc/help_pages/data.html#bibcodes |title=1.2.3 - Bibliographic Identifiers |website=The SAO/NASA Astrophysics Data System}} When the assigned value does not have the proper format, the template returns an error message along with the type of error that is encountered: :Check bibcode: Bibcode template values are expected to match these requirements: :length must be 19 characters ( = 'length') :characters in position(s): (except as specified otherwise, violations produce 'value' in the portion of the error message): ::1–4 must be digits and must represent a year in the range of 1000 – next year ( = 'year') ::5 must be a letter ::6–8 must be letter, ampersand, or dot (ampersand cannot directly precede a dot; &. ( = 'journal')) ::9 must be letter or dot ::10–18 must be letter, digit, or dot ::19 must be a letter or dot To resolve this error, ensure that the assigned bibcode value is correct. {{reflist}} ==See also== * [[Wikipedia:PMID]] * [[Wikipedia:ISBN]] * [[Wikipedia:ISSN]] * [[Wikipedia:Digital Object Identifier]] * [[Template:doi]] * [[:en:Template:Doi-inline|Template:Doi-inline]] {{Sandbox other|| [[es:Plantilla:Bibcode]] [[id:Templat:Bibcode]] [[ja:Template:Bibcode]] [[sl:Predloga:Bibcode]] }} {{wikidata link|Q6717399}} [[Category:Astronomy external link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Catalog lookup templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Bibcode%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{lua|Module:check bibcode}} This template is intended to allow simple standardized links to [[:en:Bibcode|Bibcode]]s. For example, {{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} will produce {{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} external link. ==Syntax== {{tlx|bibcode|place_bibcode_id_number_here}} ==Example== {{tlx|bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} {{bibcode|1998ApJ...508L..81K}} ==Error messages== The Bibcode template checks the bibcode value to see if it has the proper format.{{cite web |url=http://adsabs.harvard.edu/abs_doc/help_pages/data.html#bibcodes |title=1.2.3 - Bibliographic Identifiers |website=The SAO/NASA Astrophysics Data System}} When the assigned value does not have the proper format, the template returns an error message along with the type of error that is encountered: :Check bibcode: Bibcode template values are expected to match these requirements: :length must be 19 characters ( = 'length') :characters in position(s): (except as specified otherwise, violations produce 'value' in the portion of the error message): ::1–4 must be digits and must represent a year in the range of 1000 – next year ( = 'year') ::5 must be a letter ::6–8 must be letter, ampersand, or dot (ampersand cannot directly precede a dot; &. ( = 'journal')) ::9 must be letter or dot ::10–18 must be letter, digit, or dot ::19 must be a letter or dot To resolve this error, ensure that the assigned bibcode value is correct. {{reflist}} ==See also== * [[Wikipedia:PMID]] * [[Wikipedia:ISBN]] * [[Wikipedia:ISSN]] * [[Wikipedia:Digital Object Identifier]] * [[Template:doi]] * [[:en:Template:Doi-inline|Template:Doi-inline]] {{Sandbox other|| [[es:Plantilla:Bibcode]] [[id:Templat:Bibcode]] [[ja:Template:Bibcode]] [[sl:Predloga:Bibcode]] }} {{wikidata link|Q6717399}} [[Category:Astronomy external link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Catalog lookup templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
